title: Charcoal Plus
description: Charcoal Plus allows you to create charcoal blocks which works as coal blocks and also allows you to trade with charcoal as you can do with coal
body:
# ![Charcoal Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/406d6b6d2ae1810ee8f9800230614ae6ce72f5f1.png) Charcoal Plus ![Charcoal Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/406d6b6d2ae1810ee8f9800230614ae6ce72f5f1.png)

Charcoal Plus allows you to create charcoal blocks which works as coal blocks and also allows you to trade with charcoal as you can do with coal.

## ![Charcoal Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/406d6b6d2ae1810ee8f9800230614ae6ce72f5f1.png) How to craft a Charcoal Block?

![Charcoal Block Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/572772b92dd1a23efc920b3933d9f81fcb1953a6.png)
![Charcoal Block Recipe 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cdfd75b05c66a7bf872eb64dbbd1b66ad387213.png)

## ![Charcoal Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/406d6b6d2ae1810ee8f9800230614ae6ce72f5f1.png) Trades With Charcoal

![Trade With Fisherman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f0d806d128dbecbe4c52ba45b6bd7e8d8004bc4.png)
![Trade With Armorer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99df1437edf3ef22ad3135e21358514423ba4408.png)
![Trade With Toolsmith](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5dc10c604bd03851382bfb7b542d9f8ca2c2c0c.png)
![Trade With Weaponsmith](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39207eedab06dce15fe0868ff4d1f6f5ce80e418.png)
![Trade With Butcher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f5c0961c7a19473a503e4916d11a09b8ad3ac93.png)

## ![Charcoal Block In Creative Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e04b265caddd1a38f2cc026de90dd814969ce841.png)

1.5.0 Adds the Spanish translation and changes a little the In-Game description
